name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 小甜使
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 小甜使
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. Two cherubs have been custom painted over a bright-colored graffiti base. Aww, look how… precious they are
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 两个小天使被涂装在明亮的涂鸦底色上。 哇，看他们多么……珍贵呀
